title: Super Mario: Interactive adventure! - Castle Decisions
description:
The rules are as follows:
Watch a video, once the video segment is over you will be presented with two choices. Choose one choice and see if you continue on the castle, or if you die! Try to make it to the end of the castle without dying!

This is my first attempt at an interactive adventure. Enjoy!

You may write your comments once you've won the game.
